mapper.sql: select c.category_id, c.parent_id, c.ancestors, c.category_code, c.category_name, c.order_num, c.depreciable_flag, c.serial_required_flag, c.borrowable_flag, c.inventory_required_flag, c.useful_life_months, c.field_template_version, c.field_template_status, c.field_template_json, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, p.category_name as parent_name from asset_category c left join asset_category p on p.category_id = c.parent_id
mapper.select: where find_in_set(#{categoryId}, c.ancestors) and c.del_flag = '0' order by c.parent_id, c.order_num, c.category_id
select count(1) from asset_category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from asset_info where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
where c.category_name = #{categoryName} and c.parent_id = #{parentId} and c.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update asset_category set field_template_version = #{fieldTemplateVersion}, field_template_status = #{fieldTemplateStatus}, field_template_json = #{fieldTemplateJson}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'

update asset_category set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where category_id in
#{categoryId}
